name: Awesome World Models
description: Survey-linked collection spanning reinforcement-learning observation-level latent and object-centric world models
relationship: Complementary general world-model collection with broader AI coverage and no PHM-specific screening workflow

name: PHM-Vibench
description: Factory-style vibration PHM platform with configurable data model task and trainer components
main_scope: Vibration-based PHM training and evaluation infrastructure
relationship: Existing PHM training and evaluation infrastructure that can inform future protocol integration
notes: Official GitHub README and PHM Society paper inspected

name: mTSBench
description: Multivariate time-series anomaly benchmark with 344 labeled series 24 detectors and detector-selection evaluation
relationship: Anomaly-detection evaluation benchmark complementary to mechanism-centered literature classification

name: TSB-AD
description: Reliable time-series anomaly-detection benchmark with datasets algorithms metrics tutorials and leaderboard
relationship: Anomaly-detection evaluation benchmark and possible future protocol comparison target

name: RUL-Papers
description: Automatically maintained index of arXiv papers on RUL state of health and predictive maintenance
relationship: RUL literature index with broad recall but a different automated collection and verification scope
notes: Official GitHub repository and generated project page inspected

name: BatteryML
description: Open-source battery degradation toolkit with public datasets and SOH and RUL benchmark pipelines
main_scope: Battery degradation modeling and RUL benchmarking
relationship: Existing degradation and RUL infrastructure and a possible future integration target

name: AWS Fleet Predictive Maintenance
description: SageMaker solution assets for vehicle-fleet sensor preparation model training and predictive-maintenance proof of concept
relationship: Adjacent predictive-maintenance resource with a deployment-oriented rather than survey-oriented primary scope

name: MOMENT
description: Open time-series foundation models and research code for forecasting classification imputation anomaly detection and representation learning
relationship: Possible future integration target whose pretrained representations are not automatically PHM world models
